query: faded washed out desaturated photograph dull tones
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / muted_faded — desaturated, dull, washed-out tones

response.objective_caption: Close-up of a pale figure with long blonde hair wearing a white lace veil and a white garment with a ruffled neckline. The figure has blue eyes and reddish linear marks on the right cheek. The background contains out-of-focus green foliage and structural elements partially covered with plastic sheeting.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Close-up of a corpse-like figure with long blonde hair under a white lace veil and a white ruffled garment. The skin has a sickly, deathly pallor with an unhealthy grayish-white cast and darkened sockets around blue eyes. Red scratch-like wounds mark the cheek, suggesting physical degradation. The direct, staring gaze and uncanny artificial texture create an oppressive atmosphere of dread and unease, evoking a haunted or decaying bridal aesthetic against a blurred outdoor background of foliage and plastic sheeting.
